key: 1) Base values (comp_*/type_*) define the EN layout (default).
2) A language maps to a profile via: lang_<lang>_profile.
3) A profile provides overrides via: profile_<profile>_<base_key>.
4) LaTeX calls \\HBApplyLang{en|fr|es} before including each language page.

desc: Profile 'tight_1': reduce vertical spacing to fit longer languages

key: ------ PROFILE: tight_1 overrides (missing key => keep base value) ------

desc: tight_1: reduce space after H1 pill
tight_1: increase tighten before twocol (store POSITIVE number)
tight_1: reduce space after lead line
tight_1: reduce space after warning box
tight_1: reduce space before warning box
FR uses tight_1 to fit one page
ES uses tight_1 to fit one page
